backend/main.mo: Motoko actor implementing the game backend with user profile storage, high score tracking, and a leaderboard endpoint, protected by role-based access control via a MixinAuthorization mixin.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping implemented game features (3D environment, controls, traffic, HUD, leaderboard, bike selection) to their corresponding source files and test IDs with confidence ratings.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-to-two sentence summaries of every frontend source file, serving as a reference index for the project's frontend components, hooks, and assets.
frontend/index.css: Base Tailwind CSS file defining OKLCH CSS custom properties for light and dark theme tokens (background, foreground, primary, chart colors, sidebar) used throughout the UI.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML entry point titled 'Indian Bike Driving 3D' that mounts the React app into a root div and loads the main TypeScript module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component managing top-level game flow (bike selection, playing, game over, leaderboard) by composing screen components and coordinating shared game state via useGameState.
frontend/src/components/BikeSelectionScr: Bike selection screen rendering three selectable bike cards with stat bars, a background image, mandala decorations, and buttons to start the game or view the leaderboard.
frontend/src/components/game/Environment: Renders a scrolling 3D roadside environment with procedurally placed objects (trees, palm trees, buildings, chai stalls, billboards, lamp posts) that loop based on the player's speed.
frontend/src/components/game/GameOver.ts: Displays the game over screen with final score and distance stats, and allows authenticated users (via Internet Identity) to submit their score to the leaderboard.
frontend/src/components/game/GameScene.t: Main game scene component that sets up the Three.js Canvas with lighting, camera follow logic, collision detection, score/distance tracking, and composes Road, Environment, Motorcycle, Traffic, HUD, and overlay components.
frontend/src/components/game/HUD.tsx: Heads-up display overlay showing current speed, score, distance, and a segmented health bar with color-coded indicators.
frontend/src/components/game/ImpactFlash: Renders a brief radial red/orange flash overlay on screen whenever a collision is triggered, fading out after ~350ms.
3D motorcycle mesh component that handles player input for acceleration, braking, and steering with lean animation, road boundary clamping, and shared position/speed refs for collision detection.
frontend/src/components/game/Road.tsx: Renders a scrolling 3D road with procedurally generated asphalt and shoulder textures, using multiple tiling segments that loop based on the bike's speed.
frontend/src/components/game/TouchContro: Renders on-screen touch buttons for mobile devices to control accelerate, brake, left, and right inputs by calling the shared setControl function.
frontend/src/components/game/Traffic.tsx: Manages spawning, updating, and rendering of traffic vehicles (rickshaw, truck, car, bus) with 3D meshes, lane positioning, and collision data reporting.
frontend/src/components/LeaderboardScree: Leaderboard screen that fetches and displays the top 10 scores from the backend using React Query, with loading/error states and Indian-themed styling including medal icons.
frontend/src/data/bikes.ts: Exports a static array of three selectable bike configurations (Bullet, Sport, Scooter) with stats like maxSpeed, accelerationRate, and turnSpeed.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and caches an ICP backend actor using React Query, returning an authenticated or anonymous actor based on the current Internet Identity, and invalidates dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useCollisionDetection: Provides an AABB collision detection callback that checks the bike's position against a list of vehicles, enforcing a cooldown to prevent repeated collision triggers.
frontend/src/hooks/useGameState.ts: Manages core game state (status, speed, distance, score, health) with callbacks for updating values, decrementing health, and resetting the game.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides a React context and hook for Internet Identity authentication, handling AuthClient creation, login, logout, and persisting identity across page reloads.
frontend/src/hooks/useMotorcycleControls: Sets up keyboard event listeners for motorcycle controls (WASD/arrow keys) and exposes a shared mutable control state with get/set helpers to avoid React re-renders.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for fetching and mutating backend data including user profiles, leaderboard scores, and high scores via the ICP actor.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that sets up Tailwind, imports Indian-themed Google Fonts, defines an OKLCH-based color palette (saffron, terracotta), and provides custom utility classes for game UI styling.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrappers.
frontend/src/types/bike.ts: TypeScript interface defining the BikeOption shape with stats (speed, handling, acceleration) and display properties for bike selection.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading, persisting, and clearing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage fallback support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the theme with Indian-themed colors (saffron, terracotta, cream), custom fonts (Baloo 2, Rajdhani), OKLCH CSS variable mappings, and game-specific box shadows.
project_state.json: Project state manifest describing a 3D Indian motorcycle driving game built with React Three Fiber, listing existing features, required image assets, and architectural notes.
